/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names "CMakeFiles/ahfl-repl.dir/main.cpp.o" -o ahfl-repl  libahfl_tooling_repl.a ../../runtime/evaluator/libahfl_runtime_evaluator.a ../../verification/formal/libahfl_verification_formal.a ../../base/support/libahfl_base_support.a ../../compiler/backends/libahfl_compiler_backend_smv.a ../../compiler/ir/libahfl_compiler_ir.a ../../compiler/semantics/libahfl_compiler_semantics.a ../../compiler/syntax/frontend/libahfl_compiler_syntax.a ../../base/json/libahfl_base_json.a ../../compiler/syntax/parser/libahfl_compiler_syntax_parser.a ../../../third_party/antlr4/libantlr4_runtime.a -framework CoreFoundation
